## Section 2: Authentication & Authorization

## Section 3: Dangerous Operations

### Database Queries Using prepare()

taint_flows.missing_sanitizer: esc_html() / esc_attr() not applied before output

chain.expression: printf( __( 'Your server thinks your hostname resolves to %s. Some services such as garbage collection by this plugin, and WordPress scheduled posts may not operate correctly.', 'wp-super-cache' ), $ip )

sink.expression: printf( __( 'Your server thinks your hostname resolves to %s. Some services such as garbage collection by this plugin, and WordPress scheduled posts may not operate correctly.', 'wp-super-cache' ), $ip )

chain.expression: printf( __( 'Cached pages since %1$s : %2$s', 'wp-super-cache' ), date( 'M j, Y', $start_date ), number_format( get_option( 'wpsupercache_count' ) ) )

sink.expression: printf( __( 'Cached pages since %1$s : %2$s', 'wp-super-cache' ), date( 'M j, Y', $start_date ), number_format( get_option( 'wpsupercache_count' ) ) )
